firstLabel: should initialize config with default options
secondLabel: should initialize config with default options

firstLabel: should use default "global" aspect ratio for render and display sizes
secondLabel: should use default "global" aspect ratio for render and display sizes

firstLabel: should use default "chart" aspect ratio for render and display sizes
secondLabel: should use default "chart" aspect ratio for render and display sizes

firstLabel: should use "user" aspect ratio for render and display sizes
secondLabel: should use "user" aspect ratio for render and display sizes

firstLabel: should NOT apply aspect ratio when height specified
secondLabel: should NOT apply aspect ratio when height specified

firstLabel: should use default canvas size for render and display sizes
secondLabel: should use default canvas size for render and display sizes

firstLabel: should use canvas attributes for render and display sizes
secondLabel: should use canvas attributes for render and display sizes

firstLabel: should use canvas style for render and display sizes (if no attributes)
secondLabel: should use canvas style for render and display sizes (if no attributes)

firstLabel: should use attributes for the render size and style for the display size
secondLabel: should use attributes for the render size and style for the display size

firstLabel: should NOT inject the resizer element
secondLabel: should NOT inject the resizer element

firstLabel: should fill parent width and height
secondLabel: should fill parent width and height

firstLabel: should resize the canvas when parent width changes
secondLabel: should resize the canvas when parent width changes

firstLabel: should resize the canvas when parent height changes
secondLabel: should resize the canvas when parent height changes

firstLabel: should NOT include parent padding when resizing the canvas
secondLabel: should NOT include parent padding when resizing the canvas

firstLabel: should resize the canvas when the canvas display style changes from "none" to "block"
secondLabel: should resize the canvas when the canvas display style changes from "none" to "block"

firstLabel: should resize the canvas when the wrapper display style changes from "none" to "block"
secondLabel: should resize the canvas when the wrapper display style changes from "none" to "block"

firstLabel: should fill parent width and use aspect ratio to calculate height
secondLabel: should fill parent width and use aspect ratio to calculate height

firstLabel: should resize the canvas with correct apect ratio when parent width changes
secondLabel: should resize the canvas with correct apect ratio when parent width changes

firstLabel: should NOT resize the canvas when parent height changes
secondLabel: should NOT resize the canvas when parent height changes

firstLabel: should restore canvas (and context) initial values
secondLabel: should restore canvas (and context) initial values

firstLabel: should remove the resizer element when responsive: true
secondLabel: should remove the resizer element when responsive: true
